summary: Completed testing of code refactoring changes. All 22 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend components render correctly. The monolithic App.js (1784 lines) was successfully split into 6 component files (AuthContext, LandingPage, Dashboard, Editor, SharedProject, EditorWidgets, constants). Backend helper functions (download_youtube_audio, save_youtube_voice_to_actor, assemble_dubbed_video) were extracted correctly. React Router navigation works for all routes (/, /dashboard, /editor/:id, /shared/:token).
passed_tests: GET /api/auth/me returns user data with valid token
Landing page renders with Sign In button and features grid
Theme toggle works on landing page (dark/light mode)
Dashboard renders with New Project and Logout buttons
Editor page loads with upload, step progress, back button
SharedProject page renders with error state for invalid token
critical_code_review_comments: ESLint warnings in old App.js logs (lines 193, 523) appear to be stale - the refactored App.js is only 47 lines. Frontend compiles successfully with no errors.
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test projects during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Code refactoring verified successfully. App.js split into 6 components: AuthContext.jsx (auth provider, theme, callback), LandingPage.jsx (landing page), Dashboard.jsx (project list with CRUD), Editor.jsx (main editor), SharedProject.jsx (public shared view), EditorWidgets.jsx (StepProgress, ProcessingOverlay), constants.js (API URL, timeouts, languages). Backend helpers extracted: download_youtube_audio, save_youtube_voice_to_actor, assemble_dubbed_video, merge_whisper_segments, build_actors_from_segments, apply_speaker_detections, apply_fallback_speakers, separate_custom_and_tts_segments, mix_audio_timeline, fit_audio_to_duration. Test session: test_session_001 for user test-user-001.

frontend_components_split.AuthContext.jsx: Auth provider, theme toggle, callback, protected route
frontend_components_split.Editor.jsx: Main editor with all dubbing features
